name: extra
description: Small personal workflows that are useful enough to package but do not belong in Workbench.

interface.shortDescription: Personal extra workflows outside the main Workbench bundle.
interface.longDescription: A small plugin for useful personal workflows that are worth packaging but should not be mixed into the Workbench meta-tooling bundle. Starts with Trail Scriber, a day-by-day conversation trail reconstruction workflow for Codex and Claude history.
defaultPrompt: Reconstruct my work trail from these conversation logs.
Update my day-by-day agenda notes from Codex and Claude history.
Turn this date range into an Obsidian-friendly work trail.
Run Trail Scriber procrastinate mode to catch up from the last scan.
